violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by a prep table. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. PIC moved prep table. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026
Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026
The hand-washing sinks in the kitchen and service areas were lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026

The presence of small flies are not controlled as evidenced by live small flies. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026
Inspector observed a jar of Nutella soaking in a container of warm water in the mop sink. PIC removed Nutella and container from mop sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026
Ice machine located in the kitchen area was not in good repair (lid missing). New Violation. Correct By: 03/02/2026
The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: - refrigeration units (all) - freezer chests (all) New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026

The door to the hallway, located in the backroom, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the front counter bottom shelving and ice machine interior sides have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2023
Prep sink faucet was observed in poor repair. Plumbing systems to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2023
